name: Orb Of The Watcher
short_description: A tribute to the old adventure games of the nineties. Orb Of The Watcher is party based RPG where you explore the tunnels under a large city to find a magical artifact. Encountering friends, enemies and the odd pile of gold along the way.
detailed_description:
An immersive and thrilling role-playing game adventure in the style of those much-loved adventure classics from the days of the 386 processor. The game will transport players into a captivating fantasy world filled with mystical creatures, formidable challenges, and epic stories. Embrace your destiny and embark on a journey like no other as you explore the depths of Waterdeep to unravel ancient secrets and find the infamous Orb Of The Watcher.

  • A tribute to the old RPG adventures of the nineties but updated for the modern audience while still keeping the old look and feel.

  • 10 levels of action! Explore the sewers under Waterdeep and beyond.

  • Unleash Your Inner Hero: Prepare to discover what lies beneath Waterdeep as you embark on an epic quest to get rich.

  • Unearth Mystical Wonders: Engage in breathtaking skirmishes, uncover forgotten artifacts, and explore the vast tunnels that snake under the city..

  • Forge Unbreakable Alliances: Assemble a party of heroes, each with unique abilities, and strategically combine your strengths to overcome any obstacle.

  • Compatible with fifth edition.

Embark on this journey and become a legend today!
